                                              POWERFUL PEACE OF MIND

                                              Every BMW Certified pre-owned vehicle undergoes an extensive certification process in order to earn its distinction of being BMW Certified.
                                              See the Full Checklist

                                              THE BMW CERTIFIED CHECKLIST

                                              5 years old or newer
                                              Have less than 60,000 miles
                                              Up to date CARFAX® or AutoCheck® Report
                                              100% Original Genuine BMW Parts
                                              Passes a tire, wheel, and brake inspection
                                              Passes a body condition, fit, and finish inspection
                                              Passes a mechanical inspection
                                              Passes a Diagnostic & Road Test
                                              Approved by a BMW Certified Technician, a Service Manager,
                                              and the BMW Certified Manager
                                              Return to BMW Certified

                                              THE ULTIMATE ADVENTURE NOW COMES BMW CERTIFIED.

                                              Take advantage of exceptional offers on all 2021–2024 BMW Certified models.

                                              OFFERS

                                              1.99% APR up to 72 months

                                              On all 2022-2024 BMW Certified iX Models

                                              Important Info

                                              2.99% APR up to 72 months

                                              On all 2022-2024 i4, i5, i7 BMW Certified Models

                                              Important Info

                                              4.99% APR up to 36 months

                                              On all 2021-2024 BMW Certified Models (Excluding 2022-2024 EV's)

                                              Important Info

                                              WHAT IS BMW CERTIFIED?
                                              BMW Certified is an extensive certification program for pre-owned BMW vehicles providing peace of mind and legendary performance.
                                              The BMW Certified Advantage:
                                              • Diagnostic & Road Tested
                                              • Genuine BMW Parts
                                              • Up-to-date Maintenance History
                                              • BMW Certified Warranty
                                              • Additional three years of 24/7 Roadside Assistance
                                              See All Benefits
